name: place_oak_planks_barrier
description: Place 4 oak planks as a barrier to block paths when >10 blocks from hostiles and low threat
parameters: z.object({ blockCount: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(4).describe("Number of oak planks to place as a barrier"), maxDistance: z.number().int().min(1).max(5).default(3).describe("How far from the bot to attempt placing blocks") })

name: place_defensive_barrier
description: Create a defensive barrier using oak planks when alone and >10 blocks from hostiles to block spawn paths and provide cover
parameters: z.object({ blockCount: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).describe("Width of the barrier in blocks"), height: z.number().int().min(1).max(2).describe("Height of the barrier in blocks"), material: z.string().describe("The block type to use, for example 'oak_planks'"), safeRadius: z.number().min(0).describe("Minimum distance from hostiles to proceed safely") })
code: if (!bot.entity || bot.health <= 0) { return '<UNSAFE>: Bot is dead.'; } const matName = args.material.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_').replace(/^minecraft:/, ''); const findMat = function() { return bot.inventory.items().find(function(i) { return i.name === matName || (i.displayName && i.displayName.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_') === matName); }); }; if (!findMat()) { return '<NO ITEM>: No ' + args.material + ' found in inventory.'; } const hostile = Object.values(bot.entities).find(function(e) { return (e.kind === 'Hostile mobs' || e.type === 'hostile' || ['zombie', 'skeleton', 'creeper', 'spider', 'husk'].includes(e.name || '')) && e.isValid && e.position.distanceTo(bot.entity.position) < args.safeRadius; }); if (hostile) { return '<UNSAFE>: Hostiles too close (' + Math.round(hostile.position.distanceTo(bot.entity.position)) + 'm), cannot build safely.'; } startBackgroundSkill(bot, 'place_defensive_barrier', async function(token) { try { const yaw = bot.entity.yaw; const fwd = new Vec3(-Math.sin(yaw), 0, -Math.cos(yaw)); const side = new Vec3(-fwd.z, 0, fwd.x); const base = bot.entity.position.add(fwd.scaled(2.5)).floored(); for (let y = 0; y < args.height; y++) { for (let i = 0; i < args.blockCount; i++) { if (!canContinueBotAction(bot, token)) return; const offsetAmount = i - Math.floor(args.blockCount / 2); const pos = base.add(side.scaled(offsetAmount)).add(new Vec3(0, y, 0)); const block = bot.blockAt(pos); if (block && block.name !== 'air' && !block.name.includes('grass')) continue; const item = findMat(); if (!item) return; await bot.equip(item, 'hand'); const ground = bot.blockAt(pos.offset(0, -1, 0)); if (!ground || ground.name === 'air' || ground.name === 'void_air') continue; if (!await waitUntilWorldActive(bot, token, 50)) return; await bot.lookAt(pos.offset(0.5, 0, 0.5)); try { await bot.placeBlock(ground, new Vec3(0, 1, 0)); } catch (e) {} await waitForActiveMs(bot, token, 150, 50); } } } catch (err) {} }); return '<STARTED>: Placing a ' + args.blockCount + 'x' + args.height + ' ' + args.material + ' defensive barrier.';

name: eat_bread
description: Consume a piece of bread to restore health when health is low
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().default("bread").describe("The name of the food item to consume, e.g., 'bread'"), maxCount: z.number().int().min(1).max(5).default(1).describe("The maximum number of food items to consume in this session") })
